title: gaultheria thymifolia
intro: Gaultheria thymifolia, also known as Mountain Tea or Gaultheria, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gaultheria thymifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gaultheria thymifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional herbal remedies.
